rationale: C19 next_cycle_plan called for bug hunt C19 + JourneyMapDisplay visual polish. Bug hunt C19: verified 4 files (game_flow_controller, end_run_screen, journey_map_display, EndRunScreen.tscn) — 0 bugs found. All CRT_PALETTE keys valid, complete_run() phase guard prevents double-reward, EndRunScreen auto-wiring path correct, signal chain verified. Feature: JourneyMapDisplay completely rewritten with CRT terminal aesthetic — terminal font via MerlinVisual, event-type classification from effects (handles both String and Dict formats), shaped nodes (circle=standard, diamond=reputation, cross=heal, triangle=ogham), dashed connection lines, scanline overlay, pulsing glow animation on final node (victory=amber, death=danger), scroll indicators for long runs, event glyphs (+ heal, ! damage, ~ rep, * ogham, @ promise).
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C20 (verify JourneyMapDisplay _process() frame cost acceptable, _classify_event handles all effect formats from walk_event_controller). Then feature: HubAntre visual refresh — the hub screen needs CRT polish to match the new EndRunScreen and JourneyMap quality. Focus on faction reputation display with mini-bars, biome selector with maturity indicators, and Ogham equipment panel.
